data.title: Community Healthcare Trust Announces First Quarter Earnings Release Date And Conference Call
data.description: Local healthcare company Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated (NYSE: CHCT) revealed their plans to release their first-quarter results for 2026 after market close on May 5. The report will be followed by a conference at 9:00 a.m. Central Time on May 6.

data.title: First Horizon Bank Welcomes Rite Moisio as Director of Private Client Banking for the New Orleans Market
data.description: A recent announcement from First Horizon Bank reveals that Rite Moisio has assumed the role of Director of Private Client Banking for the New Orleans market. Joining the First Horizon team, Moisio brings a wealth of experience in private banking. The appointment demonstrates the bank's commitment to enhancing its services in the New Orleans market.

data.title: Hubbell to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: On April 13, 2026, in Shelton, CT, Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) revealed plans to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial outcomes before the market opens on April 30th, 2026. Following this, the company intends to conduct a webcast of its Analysts' Conference Call at 10:00 AM Eastern Time to delve deeper into the results.

data.title: HelloNation Article Featuring Personal Injury Attorney George Boll Discusses What to Do After a Car Accident
data.description: A recent article advises on crucial measures to take after a car accident, emphasizing medical care priorities and documentation for a more streamlined insurance claim process. The piece, published by HelloNation on April 13, 2026 in FRISCO, Texas, highlights key steps for drivers in the immediate aftermath of an accident. Prioritizing medical attention and comprehensive documentation can significantly aid in a smoother insurance claim procedure.

data.title: B2Gold First Quarter 2026 Results – Conference Call Details
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 13, 2026, B2Gold Corp. is set to disclose its financial and operational updates for the first quarter of 2026 post the North American market closure on May 6, 2026. The company, trading as BTO on the TSX, BTG on NYSE American, and B2G on NSX, will provide a comprehensive report on their performance during this period. Stay tuned for the detailed figures and outcomes from this quarter on May 6, 2026.

data.title: Crypto.com announces $1M in CRO fighter bonuses for White House UFC event. Record bonus pool for fighters.
data.description: During the upcoming UFC fight at the White House, the cryptocurrency exchange plans to distribute a remarkable $1 million Cronos (CRO) fighter bonus pool, setting a new record for such rewards.

data.title: PACSUN CAPTURES FESTIVAL MOMENT WITH CREATOR-LED DESERT ACTIVATIONS
data.description: Pacsun, the youth culture specialty fashion retailer, recently launched its inaugural Influencer Festival House and engaging Roadside Experiences in Los Angeles. This event took place on April 13, 2026. This initiative brought to life the brand's music and fashion elements, solidifying its presence in real-time experiences.

data.title: Sharon AI Announces Accelerated Receipt of Remaining Consideration from Sale of 50% Ownership in Texas Critical Data Centers Joint Venture
data.description: Today, SharonAI Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SHAZ) and its subsidiaries, a prominent Australian neocloud firm, unveiled the expedited reception of the remaining US$50 million Senior Secured Convertible Promissory Note. Additionally, they confirmed receiving a true-up share issuance from New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NASDAQ: NUAI). This accelerated transaction amounts to the total proceeds of the sale from Sharon AI's 50% ownership stake in Texas Critical Data Centers.

data.title: IonQ and University of Maryland Expand QLab Collaboration to Advance Quantum Networking and Research
data.description: In College Park, MD, IonQ (NYSE: IONQ) and the University of Maryland (UMD) disclosed a continued collaboration through the National Quantum Laboratory (QLab), focusing on quantum computing, quantum networking, and workforce development. The partnership extension, valued at $7.5 million, is facilitated by the State of Maryland’s Capital of Quantum Initiative via UMD Eco. This effort underscores a multi-year commitment to advancements in quantum technologies and enhancing the quantum ecosystem.

data.title: Hoth Therapeutics (HOTH) Reports Positive HT-VA CRADA Data: GDNF Reprograms Liver Fat Metabolism, Shuts Down Fat-Creation Gene and Activates Fat-Burning Pathways, Outperforming Semaglutide
data.description: A significant decrease in Srebf1, responsible for fat production, and an increase in Pparα, linked to fat metabolism, showcase GDNF as a promising treatment for MAFLD and obesity. The findings position GDNF as a cutting-edge therapy. Hoth Therapeutics, Inc., a leading biopharmaceutical firm, disclosed these promising results. The study was conducted in New York, as reported on April 13, 2026. Hoth Therapeutics, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ as HOTH and is currently in the clinical trial phase, demonstrating substantial progress in the field.

data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Issues Statement Regarding Diana Shipping’s Letter to Shareholders
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Genco Shipping & Trading Limited (NYSE:GNK), the leading U.S.-based drybulk shipowner dedicated to global commodity transportation, responded to Diana Shipping Inc.'s letter directed at Genco shareholders.
